task_completion.description: Log in to the Rancher dashboard
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Rancher UI dashboard is visible in a web browser navigated to https://localhost.

task_completion.description: Delete the legacy deployment and service
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Rancher UI (or terminal), the 'legacy-frontend' deployment and 'legacy-frontend-svc' service are shown being deleted or are visibly absent from the 'webapp-prod' namespace workload/service lists.

task_completion.description: Create a new Fleet GitRepo named 'guestbook-gitops'
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Continuous Delivery (Fleet) section in Rancher shows a GitRepo named 'guestbook-gitops' created within the 'fleet-local' namespace.

task_completion.description: Configure the GitRepo with the correct URL, branch, path, and target namespace
task_completion.visual_evidence: The GitRepo creation form or details page displays the Repository URL as 'https://github.com/rancher/fleet-examples', Branch as 'master', Path as 'simple', and the Target Namespace explicitly set to 'webapp-prod'.

task_completion.description: Ensure the new frontend deployment reaches a Running state
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Workloads page for the 'webapp-prod' namespace shows a new deployment named 'frontend' with a green 'Active' or 'Running' status indicator.

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with the actual Rancher UI or Kubernetes API
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show genuine navigation through the Rancher web interface or authentic kubectl terminal commands, rather than a text editor with mocked YAML files.

integrity.description: Verify the deployment status is authentic
integrity.visual_evidence: The 'Active' or 'Running' status of the frontend deployment must appear in the standard Rancher UI data table or standard kubectl output, without signs of HTML DOM manipulation or edited text files.

integrity.description: Verify legacy resources were actually deleted, not just hidden
integrity.visual_evidence: When checking for the absence of 'legacy-frontend' resources, the UI search/filter bar should be empty or showing all resources, ensuring the items weren't just filtered out of view.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target namespace for the deployment is 'webapp-prod'. The GitRepo must be named 'guestbook-gitops' and created in the 'fleet-local' namespace. The repository URL must be exactly 'https://github.com/rancher/fleet-examples'. The pass threshold for this task is 70 points.
